Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
J. Julia Hansen, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington, 415-288-9800 for defendant and moving party Regents of The University of California
Daniel Salazar, 650-716-6097, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court modified its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Summons And Complaint Within 3 Years. THE COURT WILL RE-EXAMINE DEFENDANT'S SERVICE TO SEE IF IT WAS PROPER. IF PROPER THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON THE BASIS OF NON-OPPOSITION. Defendant's counsel submitted form of order for The Court's consideration. (301/JLW) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
